    ("شهر رمضان الذي أنزل فيه القرآن","Aya"),

start=385

span_without_dot = raw[start:end-1]
(span_with_dot, span_without_dot == span_with_dot[:-1], raw[end-1:end] )

import re
def trim_span(raw, start, end):
    # end is exclusive
    s = raw[start:end]
    # trim from left
    left = 0
    while left < len(s) and re.match(r'[\s«»"\"“”(){}\[\]<>،؛:.\u0600-\u06FF]', s[left]):
        left += 1
    # trim from right
    right = len(s)
    while right > left and re.match(r'[\s«»"\"“”(){}\[\]<>،؛:.\u0600-\u06FF]', s[right-1]):
        right -= 1
    return s[left:right], left, right

import re
def is_punct(ch):
    return re.match(r'[\s«»"\'“”(){}\[\]<>،؛:.\u0600-\u06FF]', ch) is not None
for i,c in enumerate(s[:20]):
    print(i, c, is_punct(c))

def trim_span_fixed(raw, start, end):
    s = raw[start:end]
    trim_left = set([' ', '\t', '\n', '\r', '«','»','"',"'", '“','”','(',')','[',']','{','}','<','>','،','؛',':','.',',','!','?','…','ـ'])
    # trim left
    i = 0
    while i < len(s) and s[i] in trim_left:
        i += 1
    j = len(s)
    while j > i and s[j-1] in trim_left:
        j -= 1
    return s[i:j], i, j

start, end = 385, 537
t, l, r = trim_span_fixed(raw, start, end)
t, l, r

def get_trimmed_span(start,end, text):
    s = text[start:end]
    trimmed, l, r = trim_span_fixed(text, start, end)
    return {
        "start": start,
        "end": end,
        "trimmed": trimmed,
        "new_start": start + l,
        "new_end": start + r,
        "span_length_before": end - start,
        "span_length_after": len(trimmed)
    }

print(get_trimmed_span(102,152, raw))
print(get_trimmed_span(385,537, raw))
print(get_trimmed_span(798,828, raw))
print(get_trimmed_span(4734,4759, raw))
print(get_trimmed_span(4786,4812, raw))
